Motivation
Fix MTP (Multi-Token Prediction) speculative decoding accuracy regression on NPU with --disable-cuda-graph. Three places unconditionally called mark_forward_metadata_ready(), which prevented attention metadata from being properly initialized on the non-cuda-graph (eager) path for NPU back

sglang.title: Add EPD disaggregated encode tracing

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
EPD disaggregation runs the multimodal encode stage in a separate encoder process. The existing request trace context was not propagated to that process, so encoder-side encode work could not be shown as part of the original request trace.
Modifications

Propagate request trace state from

The OPUS paged-prefill kernel (pa_sparse_prefill_opus) is gfx950-only, but was enabled on any arch as long as aiter was importable — so MI300 wrongly dispatched to it instead of the Triton fallback.

Disaggregated decode requests create a kv_receiver during preallocation and reuse it during KV transfer. The successful transfer path already clears the receiver, but some abort/failure paths removed requests from internal queues without clearing it.

Issue
When EAGLE speculative decoding is enabled, --mem-fraction-static only controls the target model's KV cache pool. The draft model's weights and KV cache are not accounted for, causing OOM at launch:

Target KV pool is over-allocated because memory profiling runs before draft weights are loaded

sglang.title: Support Nemotron DP attention and MTP

Enable data-parallel (DP) attention for Nemotron-H. Nemotron-H is a hybrid model (Mamba2 + full attention + MoE), and DP attention previously only supported standard attention + MLP transformers. So Nemotron-H ran attention and Mamba in global TP with no path for the DP layout — there was

sglang.title: Respect explicit --max-running-requests instead of clamping to heuristic
sglang.author: vedantjh2
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When --max-running-requests is set explicitly, it is currently capped by the auto-derived estimated ceiling (min(..., 4096)) in _resolve_max_num_reqs. An explicit value larger than the heuristic is therefore silently reduced — e.g. passing 12800 still yields 4096 with no warning.
This mak

#21954 renamed KVFP4QuantizeUtil → BlockFP4KVQuantizeUtil in kvfp4_tensor.py but missed the 14 call-sites in memory_pool.py, causing an ImportError at startup for any FP4 KV cache configuration (--kv-cache-dtype fp4_e2m1).
Modifications
This PR addresses the above issue by correctly renam

sglang.title: fix(server): serialize nested dict config values as JSON
sglang.author: Sunt-ing
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
--config currently converts nested YAML dict values with str(value). For arguments declared with type=json.loads, this produces Python repr strings such as {'temperature': 0.5, 'top_p': 0.9}. json.loads rejects those strings during argparse validation, so the server exits before startup.

Make CI log fetching one obvious command for humans and agents. Previously ci-fetch-log.sh required a job UUID, and web-UI URLs (/list?sid=<step_uuid>) failed with a 403 because the sid is a step uuid, not a job uuid.
Now:
# All failed-job logs for a PR's latest build (current branch's PR if

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Rust Frontend] Return 400 for prompt-validation submit errors

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Tokenized-prompt validation failures raised during request lowering (PromptTooLong, EmptyPromptTokenIds) are wrapped in the blanket server_error! at the three submit sites, so a client sending a prompt over max_model_len receives HTTP 500 server_error instead of the 400 invalid_request_error

This pr also adds a second job that runs just the multi-gpu tests in tests/v1/kv_connector/extract_hidden_states_in

vllm.title: Fix misleading error for audio duration limit rejection
vllm.author: jperezdealgaba
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Let the descriptive ValueError from load_audio propagate directly instead of catching it and re-raising a generic "Invalid or unsupported audio file" message.  Also update the error messages to mention the VLLM_MAX_AUDIO_DECODE_DURATION_S env var so users know how to increase the limit.

vllm.title: [Perf] Use native DSA indexer decode path for next_n > 2 on SM100
vllm.author: zixi-qi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
On SM100, the DeepGEMM paged MQA logits kernels support any next_n natively (multi-atom decomposition, FP8 and FP4 indexer caches), so the FP4 indexer cache no longer needs the flattening fallback for next_n > 2 — flattening is kept only outside the SM100 family, where the FP8 kernel require

vllm.title: [Core][AMD] Propagate shutdown timeout to MultiprocExecutor
vllm.author: rjrock
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
rocprofv3 requires a grace period during process shutdown in order to emit trace data. This PR adds the environment variable VLLM_WORKER_SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS that sets a shutdown grace period for worker processes of MultiProcExecutor. The env var is also passed to the engine manager shut

vllm.title: [Refactor] Deprecate ResponsesParser wrapper, inline parsing into ParsableContext
vllm.author: sfeng33
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
ResponsesParser was an unnecessary indirection layer between ParsableContext and Parser. It held state (response_messages, finish_reason) that logically belongs on ParsableContext, and its process() method was just three lines delegating to Parser.parse() + build_response_output_items(). Rem

vllm.title: [Kernel] Consolidate Marlin thread-tile padding across all dense Marlin paths
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Marlin GEMM/repack require the rank-local (N, K) to match a thread-tile family: (n%64, k%128) or (n%128, k%64). TP sharding can produce shapes satisfying neither — FP4/FP8 paths crash at repack (e.g. nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-NVFP4 at TP4) and GPTQ/AWQ/WNA16 reject Marlin and

vllm.title: Add the QuantizedActivation linear-kernel contract
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
First part of #43224 for quant fusion support.
Introduce QuantizedActivation: a pre-quantized activation that fused kernel can hand directly to a linear so the linear skips its own input quant.
The contract lives in fusion/quant_activation.py with two helpers:

expose_input_quant_key (the si

vllm.title: [ROCm][DSV4][Perf] Fuse inverse-RoPE and cache bf16 wo_a in o-projection
vllm.author: Fangzhou-Ai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The ROCm DeepSeek V4 o-projection (rocm_inv_rope_einsum, run once per decode layer) ran the inverse GPT-J RoPE as ~10 small PyTorch kernels  (clone, index_select, 2x repeat_interleave, neg, stack, cat, casts) and re-dequantized the static fp8 wo_a weight every step (fp8->fp32->*scale ->bf16)

The uv pip install commands utilize the --torch-backend cpu flag, pointing uv to the PyTorch wheel
